backend/main.mo: Defines the main actor with all appointment, client record, financial, statistics, and authorization-related types plus mutable state maps for rendez-vous, clients, profiles, and credits.
backend/migration.mo: Provides type definitions matching the backend data model and a migration function that upgrades old actor state to the new structure including clientRecordMap.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries describing implemented frontend features, associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of multiple frontend files detailing routing, components, hooks, UI elements, and new client database features.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML page that loads the React application’s root element and main TypeScript bundle.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up authentication flow, routing, theme provider, and global layout including the new Client Database route.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentActio: Dialog for choosing edit or delete actions on an appointment, opening corresponding edit or delete subdialogs based on user selection.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDelet: Dialog allowing deletion of a single appointment or all future ones for the same client, with async mutation and loading state.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDialo: Form dialog to create or edit appointments, handling recurrence, client selection, and submitting add/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentEditM: Empty file placeholder for appointment editing menu.
Lists appointments with sorting, payment status, repetition labels, and opens an action dialog for selected items.
frontend/src/components/ClientPhotoField: Image upload field that validates, crops to 35×45mm, previews, and allows removing a client's photo.
frontend/src/components/FinancialOvervie: Displays monthly financial metrics including paid amounts, due amounts, and total completed appointments.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer with attribution and external link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with navigation, user session controls, and button to create a new appointment.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyListingTa: Renders a monthly financial listing table and computes totals using helper functions with memoized calculations.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal prompting the user to enter and save their name via a profile creation mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to the user’s Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for managing Internet Identity login, stored identity loading, and logout behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for profiles, clients, and appointments using the backend actor for fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and custom CSS variables plus layout helpers for the monthly accounting table.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDatabasePage.ts: Implements a full CRUD interface for client records with forms, photo handling, validation, and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/ComptaMoisPage.tsx: Monthly accounting page displaying appointments, financial stats, and editable payment fields with navigation between months.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard showing financial summaries, monthly listings, and navigable monthly statistics using appointment and listing data.
frontend/src/pages/ListingMensuelPage.ts: Empty page placeholder for monthly listing.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login screen using Internet Identity with marketing-style feature highlights and a login button.
frontend/src/pages/RapportPDFPage.tsx: Generates downloadable reports (weekly, monthly, annual) with monthly listing calculations and revenue summaries.
frontend/src/utils/bigintMath.ts: Utility functions for bigint arithmetic including abs, clamping, sum, min, and max.
frontend/src/utils/imageCrop.ts: Image utilities to crop photos to 35x45 ratio and convert Uint8Array images to blob URLs.
frontend/src/utils/monthlyListing.ts: Provides bigint-based utilities for monthly client revenue calculations, including revenues, credits, and legacy compatibility helpers.
frontend/src/utils/timeRange.ts: Defines bigint timestamp utilities for month boundaries and time comparisons without precision loss.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Handles URL parameter extraction and persistence via sessionStorage, supporting both query and hash routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS theme, colors, animations, and plugins such as typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s current state, feature set, and requirements for client database, photos, and payment reporting.
